requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (NS / IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA; Kigali / Montreal Protocol)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（NS / IEC 60335-2-24附件AA；基加利/蒙特利尔议定书）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（NS / IEC 60335-2-24附件AA；基加利/蒙特利爾議定書）

summary.en: Senegal does not operate an EU-style F-Gas phase-down regulation. Refrigerant control for refrigerators rests on two pillars: （1） product safety — flammable-refrigerant charge limits, ventilation and ignition-source requirements per IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA （adopted as NS by ASN）, applicable to R-600a （isobutane, hydrocarbon, ISO 817 class A3, GWP ≈ 3）; and （2） ozone/climate treaty obligations — Senegal is a Party to the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment, controlling HFC consumption/import through a national ozone unit and import-licensing/quota system administered by the environment ministry, rather than through an EU-style per-product market-placement prohibition. Imported refrigerators using R-600a are well-positioned. Manufacturers must verify R-600a charge against IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA limits, declare the refrigerant designation and charge weight （grams） in the （French） product documentation, and ensure any HFC-based models （e.g. R-134a） comply with Senegal's HFC import-control measures.
summary.zh: 塞内加尔不实行欧盟式的氟气体削减法规。电冰箱的制冷剂管控依托两大支柱：（1）产品安全——依据IEC 60335-2-24附件AA（ASN采纳为NS）的可燃制冷剂充注量限制、通风及点火源要求，适用于R-600a（异丁烷，碳氢化合物，ISO 817 A3类，GWP约3）；（2）臭氧/气候条约义务——塞内加尔是《蒙特利尔议定书》及其《基加利修正案》缔约方，通过环境部管理的国家臭氧机构及进口许可/配额制度管控HFC的消费/进口，而非通过欧盟式的逐产品市场投放禁令。使用R-600a的进口电冰箱条件良好。制造商须核实R-600a充注量是否符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值，在（法语）产品文件中声明制冷剂名称及充注量（克），并确保任何含HFC型号（如R-134a）符合塞内加尔的HFC进口管控措施。
summary.zht: 塞內加爾不實行歐盟式的氟氣體削減法規。電冰箱的製冷劑管控依託兩大支柱：（1）產品安全——依據IEC 60335-2-24附件AA（ASN採納為NS）的可燃製冷劑充注量限制、通風及點火源要求，適用於R-600a（異丁烷，碳氫化合物，ISO 817 A3類，GWP約3）；（2）臭氧/氣候條約義務——塞內加爾是《蒙特利爾議定書》及其《基加利修正案》締約方，通過環境部管理的國家臭氧機構及進口許可/配額制度管控HFC的消費/進口，而非通過歐盟式的逐產品市場投放禁令。使用R-600a的進口電冰箱條件良好。製造商須核實R-600a充注量是否符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值，在（法語）產品文件中聲明製冷劑名稱及充注量（克），並確保任何含HFC型號（如R-134a）符合塞內加爾的HFC進口管控措施。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA — Requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition source requirements) (adopted as NS by ASN)
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)

Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment — Senegal is a Party; HFC consumption/import controlled via national ozone unit and import licensing/quota (environment ministry), not an EU-style F-Gas per-product prohibition

summary.en: China addresses flammable-refrigerant safety for household appliances within GB 4706.13-2014 （incorporating R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24）, with general refrigeration-system safety in GB 9237 （aligned with ISO 5149）. China operates its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment （ratified June 2021）, administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment （MEE） through its own consumption/production-control schedule. Because both China and Senegal anchor flammable-refrigerant safety to IEC 60335-2-24, the underlying R-600a safety content is closely aligned; on the treaty side both are Kigali Parties operating national HFC controls rather than EU-style F-Gas product prohibitions.
summary.zh: 中国在GB 4706.13-2014中处理家用器具的可燃制冷剂安全（纳入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定），制冷系统的通用安全见GB 9237（参照ISO 5149）。中国依据《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）执行HFC削减，由生态环境部（MEE）通过其自有的消费/生产管控计划管理。由于中国与塞内加尔均将可燃制冷剂安全锚定于IEC 60335-2-24，底层R-600a安全内容高度一致；在条约层面，两者均为《基加利修正案》缔约方，实行国家HFC管控而非欧盟式的氟气体产品禁令。
summary.zht: 中國在GB 4706.13-2014中處理家用器具的可燃製冷劑安全（納入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定），製冷系統的通用安全見GB 9237（參照ISO 5149）。中國依據《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）執行HFC削減，由生態環境部（MEE）通過其自有的消費/生產管控計畫管理。由於中國與塞內加爾均將可燃製冷劑安全錨定於IEC 60335-2-24，底層R-600a安全內容高度一致；在條約層面，兩者均為《基加利修正案》締約方，實行國家HFC管控而非歐盟式的氟氣體產品禁令。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Annex provisions for flammable refrigerant (R-600a) requirements in household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down schedule (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances the gap is documentation and import-control alignment rather than a technology gap: （1） product documentation must state the refrigerant designation （R-600a / isobutane）, charge weight in grams, and safety precautions per IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA, in French for the Senegalese market; （2） the R-600a charge must be verified against IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA maximum limits, which depend on room volume and appliance configuration — Chinese CCC test reports may not explicitly confirm these limits if tested under different configurations; （3） unlike the EU there is no per-product F-Gas market-placement prohibition, but any HFC-based models （e.g. R-134a） may be affected by Senegal's national HFC import-licensing/quota under the Kigali Amendment — the importer must hold the necessary HFC import authorisation. [NOTE: Senegal's exact national HFC import-control thresholds and any refrigerator-specific measures should be confirmed with the national ozone unit / environment ministry before regulatory submissions.]
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，差距在于文件和进口管控的衔接，而非技术差距：（1）产品文件须以法语说明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）、充注量（克）及依据IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的安全注意事项；（2）R-600a充注量须核实是否符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA最大限值，该限值取决于房间容积和器具配置——若中国CCC检测报告在不同配置下测试，可能未明确确认这些限值；（3）与欧盟不同，塞内加尔无逐产品的氟气体市场投放禁令，但任何含HFC型号（如R-134a）可能受塞内加尔依《基加利修正案》实施的国家HFC进口许可/配额影响——进口商须持有必要的HFC进口授权。【注：应在监管提交前向国家臭氧机构/环境部确认塞内加尔具体的国家HFC进口管控门槛及任何电冰箱专项措施。】
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，差距在於文件和進口管控的銜接，而非技術差距：（1）產品文件須以法語說明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）、充注量（克）及依據IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的安全注意事項；（2）R-600a充注量須核實是否符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA最大限值，該限值取決於房間容積和器具配置——若中國CCC檢測報告在不同配置下測試，可能未明確確認這些限值；（3）與歐盟不同，塞內加爾無逐產品的氟氣體市場投放禁令，但任何含HFC型號（如R-134a）可能受塞內加爾依《基加利修正案》實施的國家HFC進口許可/配額影響——進口商須持有必要的HFC進口授權。【注：應在監管提交前向國家臭氧機構/環境部確認塞內加爾具體的國家HFC進口管控門檻及任何電冰箱專項措施。】

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level — R-600a flammable-refrigerant charge limits via NS/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA; HFC imports controlled via Senegal's national Kigali/Montreal Protocol import licensing/quota (no EU-style per-product F-Gas prohibition)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE

source.publisher: UNEP Ozone Secretariat (Montreal Protocol / Kigali Amendment — Senegal) / ASN

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is well-positioned for Senegal: there is no EU-style per-product F-Gas prohibition, and flammable-refrigerant safety is benchmarked to NS/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA. Manufacturers must verify R-600a charge against Annex AA limits and declare refrigerant type and charge weight in French documentation. Any HFC-based models may be affected by Senegal's national HFC import licensing/quota under the Kigali Amendment — confirm with the importer and the national ozone unit.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a在塞内加尔条件良好：无欧盟式的逐产品氟气体禁令，可燃制冷剂安全以NS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA为基准。制造商须核实R-600a充注量是否符合附件AA限值，并在法语文件中声明制冷剂类型及充注量。任何含HFC型号可能受塞内加尔依《基加利修正案》实施的国家HFC进口许可/配额影响——须与进口商及国家臭氧机构确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a在塞內加爾條件良好：無歐盟式的逐產品氟氣體禁令，可燃製冷劑安全以NS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA為基準。製造商須核實R-600a充注量是否符合附件AA限值，並在法語文件中聲明製冷劑類型及充注量。任何含HFC型號可能受塞內加爾依《基加利修正案》實施的國家HFC進口許可/配額影響——須與進口商及國家臭氧機構確認。
